questions.question_text: Discuss the significance of the concept of Tawheed in Islam and its implications for Muslim life.
Analyze the impact of the Prophet Muhammad's (PBUH) life and teachings on the development of Islamic civilization.
Evaluate the role of Hadith in shaping Islamic jurisprudence and ethics.
Examine the contributions of Islamic scholars during the Golden Age of Islam to various fields of knowledge.
Discuss the concept of Jihad in Islam and differentiate between its various interpretations.
Reflect on the importance of community (Ummah) in Islamic teachings and its role in contemporary society.
Analyze the challenges faced by Islamic societies in the modern world and propose possible solutions.
Critically assess the impact of globalization on Islamic values and cultural identity.
Discuss the ethical teachings of the Quran and their relevance in today's world.
Examine the relationship between Islam and politics, focusing on the concept of Shura (consultation) in governance.
